name: ASP Isotopes Inc.
description: ASP Isotopes Inc. is a pre-commercial stage advanced materials company dedicated to the development of technology and processes for the enrichment of isotopes for use in multiple industries. The company's primary focus is on the production of isotopes for the healthcare and energy sectors, specifically targeting the supply of high-assay low-enriched uranium (HALEU) for the next generation of nuclear reactors. Utilizing its proprietary Aerodynamic Separation Process (ASP) and Quantum Enrichment technology, the company aims to provide a more efficient and cost-effective method for isotope enrichment compared to traditional centrifuge techniques.
